block_02: We are excited to announce that we have added 2 new payment methods: USDT and USDC.
block_03: Why do users prefer USDT и USDC?
block_04: Tether (USDT) and USD Coin (USDC) are the most popular stablecoins. They can be exchanged for US dollars at the 1:1 ratio. Stablecoins are pegged to the US dollar, which means they can enjoy the benefits of being a fast, secure, and relatively cheap payment option without the extreme volatility associated with Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.
block_05: Requirements for USDT and USDC payments
block_06: Only available for withdrawals from non-European balance
block_09: During the initial period, the minimum payout amount will be $500
block_10: To switch your payment method to USDT or USDC, proceed to the Personal Area and change your default method in the settings.
